---
title: "통계챗봇"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.chatbot-wrap {
  max-width: 820px;
  margin: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.chatbot-intro {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a2f 0%, #2e5441 60%, #3a6b52 100%);
  color: #f5f0e8;
  padding: 1.2rem 1.6rem;
  border-radius: 10px;
}
.chatbot-intro h2 {
  margin: 0 0 0.3rem;
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  color: #f5f0e8;
}
.chatbot-intro h2 span { color: #d4a017; }
.chatbot-intro p {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.chat-log {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.9rem;
  min-height: 200px;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.2rem;
}

.chat-row {
  display: flex;
}
.chat-row.user { justify-content: flex-end; }
.chat-row.assistant { justify-content: flex-start; }

.bubble {
  max-width: 80%;
  padding: 0.7rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}
.chat-row.user .bubble {
  background-color: #1e3a2f;
  color: #f5f0e8;
}
.chat-row.assistant .bubble {
  background-color: #f3f7ff;
  color: #212529;
  width: 100%;
}

.assistant-lead {
  margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #003366;
}

.result-card {
  border: 1px solid #e2e2e2;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 0.7rem 0.9rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  background: #ffffff;
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
}
.result-card:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
.result-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.result-card .crumbs {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #6c757d;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}
.result-card .title {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #003366;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}
.result-card .snippet {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #495057;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}
.result-card .snippet mark {
  background-color: #ffe58a;
  padding: 0 2px;
}
.result-card a.more-link {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #d4a017;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.result-card a.more-link:hover {
  color: #FFA500;
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.example-chips {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
}
.example-chip {
  border: 1px solid #d4a017;
  color: #1e3a2f;
  background: #fff8e6;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.example-chip:hover {
  background: #ffe58a;
}

.input-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  position: sticky;
  bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.input-row input {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 0.7rem 0.9rem;
  border: 1px solid #ced4da;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}
.input-row input:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: #1e3a2f;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(30, 58, 47, 0.15);
}
</style>

<div class="chatbot-wrap">
  <div class="chatbot-intro">
    <h2>📊 통계<span>챗봇</span></h2>
    <p>궁금한 통계 개념을 자유롭게 물어보세요. 강의노트 섹션에서 관련 내용을 찾아 보여드립니다. (별도 서버·API 키 없이 브라우저에서 바로 검색합니다)</p>
  </div>

  <div class="example-chips" id="exampleChips">
    <span class="example-chip">신뢰구간에 대하여 궁금합니다</span>
    <span class="example-chip">회귀분석을 알고 싶어요</span>
    <span class="example-chip">군집분석 방법이 궁금해요</span>
    <span class="example-chip">시계열 예측 모형을 알려주세요</span>
  </div>

  <div class="chat-log" id="chatLog"></div>

  <div class="input-row">
    <input type="text" id="chatInput" placeholder="궁금하신 통계 개념을 입력해보세요 (예: 신뢰구간에 대하여 궁금합니다)" autocomplete="off" />
    <button class="btn btn-primary" id="sendBtn">검색</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  const NO_MATCH_THRESHOLD = 0.12;
  const JOSA = ['에서', '에게', '한테', '께서', '로서', '로써', '부터', '까지', '조차', '마저', '밖에',
                '은', '는', '이', '가', '을', '를', '의', '도', '만', '로', '와', '과', '에'];
  JOSA.sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length);

  const chatLog = document.getElementById('chatLog');
  const chatInput = document.getElementById('chatInput');
  const sendBtn = document.getElementById('sendBtn');
  const exampleChips = document.getElementById('exampleChips');

  let notes = [];
  let ready = false;

  function decodeEntities(str) {
    const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
    ta.innerHTML = str;
    return ta.value;
  }

  function charBigrams(word) {
    const grams = new Set();
    for (let i = 0; i < word.length - 1; i++) {
      grams.add(word.slice(i, i + 2));
    }
    return grams;
  }

  function fieldBigrams(text) {
    const grams = new Set();
    text.split(/\s+/).forEach(w => {
      if (w.length >= 2) charBigrams(w).forEach(g => grams.add(g));
    });
    return grams;
  }

  function stemForms(word) {
    const forms = [word];
    for (const j of JOSA) {
      if (word.endsWith(j) && word.length - j.length >= 2) {
        forms.push(word.slice(0, -j.length));
      }
    }
    return forms;
  }

  async function loadIndex() {
    try {
      const res = await fetch('search.json');
      const data = await res.json();
      notes = data
        .filter(e => e.href.startsWith('notes/'))
        .map(e => {
          const title = decodeEntities(e.title || '');
          const section = decodeEntities(e.section || '');
          const text = decodeEntities(e.text || '');
          return {
            href: e.href,
            crumbs: e.crumbs || [],
            title, section, text,
            titleBigrams: fieldBigrams(title),
            sectionBigrams: fieldBigrams(section),
            textBigrams: fieldBigrams(text)
          };
        });
      ready = true;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('강의노트 인덱스 로드 실패:', err);
      ready = false;
    }
  }

  function fieldScore(fieldRaw, fieldBigrams, qWords, qBigrams) {
    if (!fieldRaw) return 0;
    let overlap = 0;
    qBigrams.forEach(g => { if (fieldBigrams.has(g)) overlap++; });
    const bigramCoverage = qBigrams.size ? overlap / qBigrams.size : 0;

    let hits = 0;
    qWords.forEach(w => {
      const forms = stemForms(w);
      if (forms.some(f => fieldRaw.includes(f))) hits++;
    });
    const exactMatchRatio = qWords.length ? hits / qWords.length : 0;

    return 0.4 * bigramCoverage + 0.6 * exactMatchRatio;
  }

  function chunkScore(chunk, qWords, qBigrams) {
    const titleScore = fieldScore(chunk.title, chunk.titleBigrams, qWords, qBigrams);
    const sectionScore = fieldScore(chunk.section, chunk.sectionBigrams, qWords, qBigrams);
    const textScore = fieldScore(chunk.text, chunk.textBigrams, qWords, qBigrams);
    return (3 * titleScore + 2 * sectionScore + 1 * textScore) / 6;
  }

  function buildSnippet(chunk, qWords) {
    const text = chunk.text;
    let idx = -1;
    let matchLen = 0;
    for (const w of qWords) {
      for (const form of stemForms(w)) {
        if (form.length < 2) continue;
        const i = text.indexOf(form);
        if (i !== -1 && (idx === -1 || i < idx)) {
          idx = i;
          matchLen = form.length;
        }
      }
    }

    let start, end, highlightStart, highlightEnd;
    if (idx === -1) {
      start = 0;
      end = Math.min(150, text.length);
      highlightStart = -1;
      highlightEnd = -1;
    } else {
      start = Math.max(0, idx - 60);
      end = Math.min(text.length, idx + matchLen + 90);
      highlightStart = idx - start;
      highlightEnd = highlightStart + matchLen;
    }

    const slice = text.slice(start, end);
    const prefix = start > 0 ? '…' : '';
    const suffix = end < text.length ? '…' : '';

    const escapeHtml = s => s.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');

    if (highlightStart === -1) {
      return prefix + escapeHtml(slice) + suffix;
    }
    const before = escapeHtml(slice.slice(0, highlightStart));
    const match = escapeHtml(slice.slice(highlightStart, highlightEnd));
    const after = escapeHtml(slice.slice(highlightEnd));
    return prefix + before + '<mark>' + match + '</mark>' + after + suffix;
  }

  function search(query) {
    const qWords = query.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0);
    const qBigrams = new Set();
    qWords.forEach(w => charBigrams(w).forEach(g => qBigrams.add(g)));

    const pageScore = {};
    const pageBestChunk = {};

    notes.forEach(chunk => {
      const score = chunkScore(chunk, qWords, qBigrams);
      const page = chunk.href.split('#')[0];
      if (!(page in pageScore) || score > pageScore[page]) {
        pageScore[page] = score;
        pageBestChunk[page] = chunk;
      }
    });

    const ranked = Object.keys(pageScore)
      .map(page => ({ page, score: pageScore[page], chunk: pageBestChunk[page] }))
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
      .slice(0, 5);

    return { ranked, qWords };
  }

  function addRow(role, contentEl) {
    const row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'chat-row ' + role;
    const bubble = document.createElement('div');
    bubble.className = 'bubble';
    bubble.appendChild(contentEl);
    row.appendChild(bubble);
    chatLog.appendChild(row);
    chatLog.scrollTop = chatLog.scrollHeight;
  }

  function addUserMessage(text) {
    const span = document.createElement('span');
    span.textContent = text;
    addRow('user', span);
  }

  function addAssistantResults(query) {
    const { ranked, qWords } = search(query);
    const wrap = document.createElement('div');

    if (!ranked.length || ranked[0].score < NO_MATCH_THRESHOLD) {
      const lead = document.createElement('p');
      lead.className = 'assistant-lead';
      lead.textContent = '관련된 강의노트를 찾지 못했습니다. 다른 표현으로 다시 질문해보시겠어요?';
      wrap.appendChild(lead);
      addRow('assistant', wrap);
      return;
    }

    const lead = document.createElement('p');
    lead.className = 'assistant-lead';
    lead.textContent = '관련 강의노트를 찾았습니다:';
    wrap.appendChild(lead);

    ranked.forEach(({ chunk, score }) => {
      if (score < NO_MATCH_THRESHOLD) return;
      const card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'result-card';

      const crumbsEl = document.createElement('div');
      crumbsEl.className = 'crumbs';
      crumbsEl.textContent = (chunk.crumbs || []).join(' > ');
      card.appendChild(crumbsEl);

      const titleEl = document.createElement('div');
      titleEl.className = 'title';
      titleEl.textContent = chunk.title + (chunk.section ? ' — ' + chunk.section.replace(/^\d+(\.\d+)*\s*/, '') : '');
      card.appendChild(titleEl);

      const snippetEl = document.createElement('div');
      snippetEl.className = 'snippet';
      snippetEl.innerHTML = buildSnippet(chunk, qWords);
      card.appendChild(snippetEl);

      const link = document.createElement('a');
      link.className = 'more-link';
      link.href = chunk.href;
      link.textContent = '자세히 보기 →';
      card.appendChild(link);

      wrap.appendChild(card);
    });

    addRow('assistant', wrap);
  }

  async function handleSend() {
    const query = chatInput.value.trim();
    if (!query) return;
    chatInput.value = '';

    if (!ready) {
      addUserMessage(query);
      const wrap = document.createElement('div');
      const lead = document.createElement('p');
      lead.className = 'assistant-lead';
      lead.textContent = '강의노트를 불러오는 중입니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도해주세요.';
      wrap.appendChild(lead);
      addRow('assistant', wrap);
      return;
    }

    addUserMessage(query);
    addAssistantResults(query);
  }

  sendBtn.addEventListener('click', handleSend);
  chatInput.addEventListener('keypress', function (e) {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
      e.preventDefault();
      handleSend();
    }
  });
  exampleChips.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    if (e.target.classList.contains('example-chip')) {
      chatInput.value = e.target.textContent;
      handleSend();
    }
  });

  loadIndex();
})();
</script>
```
